QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r348383/

Log:
  FSEvents API with Signals catching (without RubyCocoa).
  
  WWW: http://rubygems.org/gems/rb-fsevent/
  
  PR:		ports/187587
  Submitted by:	Joseph Benden <joe@thrallingpenguin.com>

Added:
  head/devel/rubygem-rb-fsevent/
  head/devel/rubygem-rb-fsevent/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-rb-fsevent/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-rb-fsevent/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Sat Mar 15 22:05:26 2014	(r348382)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Sat Mar 15 22:44:32 2014	(r348383)
@@ -4311,6 +4311,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rake-compiler
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rapt
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rash
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-rb-fsevent
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rb-inotify
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rb-kqueue
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rcov

Added: head/devel/rubygem-rb-fsevent/Makefile

+++ head/devel/rubygem-rb-fsevent/Makefile	Sat Mar 15 22:44:32 2014	(r348383)
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@

+# $FreeBSD$

+PORTNAME=	rb-fsevent
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.4

+
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
+COMMENT=	FSEvents API with Signals catching (without RubyCocoa)
+
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>
